title: endiandra palmerstonii
intro: Endiandra palmerstonii, also known as the Palmscreen, is a species of rainforest tree native to Queensland, Australia, belonging to the family Lauraceae. The medicinal properties of Endiandra palmerstonii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be utilized to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and provide antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Endiandra palmerstonii include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or boiling the bark in water to create a medicinal tea.
